name: dba-assistant-langgraph
description: BYO LangGraph DBA assistant. Uses MCP tools through agentgateway; demonstrates agent-side HITL via LangGraph interrupt() and gateway-side HITL via the AgentgatewayPolicy extAuth on /privileged.
